name: Shoprite Holdings Limited

anchor.source: SH1 - Shoprite reviewed results, 52 weeks ended 29 June 2025 (FY2024 restated IFRS 5)

rationale: Scenario A (Strait open): Brent ~$70-80, pump prices ease, food inflation low, SARB resumes cutting, rand firms. Shoprite's tailwind case - lower diesel/finance costs, volume recovery, room to ease price investment; HEPS re-accelerates toward low-teens, but the share can lag a cyclical relief rally. Scenario B (Strait shut): Brent ~$95-110+, pump at/above record, rand weak, SARB tightens (~8.17% severe path). Tougher business - diesel tailwind reverses with a lag, finance costs climb, volumes soften, margin pressured; HEPS decelerates to mid/high-single-digit. But this is its relative-strength case: non-discretionary food, value leader, prime trade-down beneficiary, net cash funds price cuts.
